app.title: Moving Motivators
app.subtitle: A Management 3.0 practice
app.tagline: Rank what drives you. See how change affects it.

home.teamUnavailable: Team sessions require Firebase setup — see README

rank.title: Rank Your Motivators
rank.instruction: Drag the cards to order them — most important on the left, least important on the right.

assess.title: Assess a Change
assess.instruction: Describe a change you're facing (e.g. 'move to remote work', 'new manager', 'project pivot').
assess.impactInstruction: Now tap ↑ or ↓ on each card to show whether this change positively or negatively affects that motivator.

results.title: Your Results
results.insight: The motivators that matter most to you and are negatively affected deserve the most attention.

curiosity.name: Curiosity
curiosity.desc: I am motivated by learning and exploring new ideas.

honor.name: Honor
honor.desc: I am motivated by upholding my personal values.

acceptance.name: Acceptance
acceptance.desc: I am motivated by the approval of those around me.

mastery.name: Mastery
mastery.desc: I am motivated by improving my competence and skills.

power.name: Power
power.desc: I am motivated by having influence over what happens.

freedom.name: Freedom
freedom.desc: I am motivated by independence and self-direction.

relatedness.name: Relatedness
relatedness.desc: I am motivated by close social bonds and teamwork.

order.name: Order
order.desc: I am motivated by stability and a predictable environment.

goal.name: Goal
goal.desc: I am motivated by a higher purpose and sense of meaning.

status.name: Status
status.desc: I am motivated by recognition and a good reputation.
